<?php
// @camis:generated — do not edit; regenerated by camis

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Observers;

use App\Ai\Provider;
use App\Models\Article;

class ArticleObserver
{
    public function creating(Article $record): void
    {
        $this->populateAi($record, true);
    }

    public function updating(Article $record): void
    {
        $this->populateAi($record, false);
    }

    private function populateAi(Article $record, bool $isCreate): void
    {
        if ($isCreate || ($record->isDirty('body'))) {
            $prompt = str_replace(['{{body}}'], [(string) $record->body], 'Summarize in one line: {{body}}');
            $record->summary = Provider::generate(null, $prompt);
        }
    }
}
